response:
Veda Hlubinka-Cook was a software programmer at Brøderbund in the 1980s and was the model for one of the characters in Jordan Mechner's game "Prince of Persia". She designed and created the computer game "D/Generation" and was technical director for the computer game "The Last Express". 

The 1997 video game that takes place on the Orient Express, days before the start of World War I, is "The Last Express", and Veda Hlubinka-Cook was involved in its development. 

**Answer:** Veda Hlubinka-Cook was a software programmer and technical director for the computer game "The Last Express".
